goal: Land the ripgrep plugin metadata and end-to-end smoke test for P2-W7-F07: NEW `plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` declaring ripgrep as a `search.text` plugin (in-process per DEC-0009 — manifest is metadata; the runtime path remains `crates/ucil-daemon/src/text_search.rs` from WO-0035), NEW `scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh` idempotent install hint, EXTEND the existing `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` (from WO-0044) with a `ripgrep_manifest_parses` parse-only test (NO MCP `health_check` round-trip — ripgrep does not speak MCP per DEC-0009), and REWRITE `scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh` (currently a `TODO; exit 1` stub) to assert ripgrep on PATH, run the new cargo test, exercise `rg --json` against the fixture and validate structured JSON match output, and verify `.gitignore` is honoured by running `rg` at the repo root and asserting `target/` paths are absent from results.
plan_summary: Pattern follows WO-0044 (ast-grep + probe manifests) WITHOUT the MCP `PluginManager::health_check` round-trip — ripgrep is in-process per DEC-0009, so the manifest is declarative metadata only. Four artifacts: (A) NEW `plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` with `[plugin]` (name `ripgrep`, version pinned to system-binary version e.g. `14.x`), `[capabilities]` (`provides = ["search.text"]`, `languages = []` — ripgrep is language-agnostic text search), `[transport]` (stdio sentinel `command = "rg"`, `args = ["--version"]` so the manifest parses cleanly via the existing `PluginManifest::from_path` schema; the daemon does not invoke this transport because DEC-0009 short-circuits ripgrep to in-process before any spawn), `[lifecycle]` (`hot_cold = false`, `idle_timeout_minutes = 0` — ripgrep is per-query spawn-and-exit, no resident process). Header comment block cites DEC-0009 + master-plan §14.1 (search category) + the in-process runtime path at `crates/ucil-daemon/src/text_search.rs`. (B) NEW `scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh` — idempotent: `command -v rg` → print version + exit 0 if present; otherwise print install hints for cargo/brew/apt and exit 0 (no auto-install side effects, matches `install-ast-grep.sh` / `install-probe.sh` pattern). (C) EXTEND `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` adding ONE new sync `#[test] fn ripgrep_manifest_parses()` inside the existing `mod plugin_manifests { }` block (NOT inside `mod tests {}` — DEC-0007 module-root frozen-selector placement; the wrapper module is the WO-0044 convention for this file specifically). The test loads the manifest via `PluginManifest::from_path(repo_root().join("plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml"))`, asserts: (1) `manifest.plugin.name == "ripgrep"`, (2) `manifest.capabilities.provides.contains(&"search.text".to_string())`, (3) `manifest.capabilities.languages.is_empty()` (language-agnostic), (4) `manifest.transport.transport_type == "stdio"` (or whatever the field is — executor inspects `TransportSection` at `crates/ucil-daemon/src/plugin_manager.rs:143`), (5) `manifest.lifecycle.hot_cold == false`. NO `health_check` call (ripgrep is in-process per DEC-0009 — calling health_check would spawn `rg --version` which exits without speaking MCP and the test would (correctly) fail). NO mocks; pure parse-only. Reuse the existing `repo_root()` helper at lines 52-60. (D) REWRITE `scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh` (current stub at lines 1-6 just echoes TODO and exits 1). New script: (1) `set -euo pipefail`, `cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"`. (2) Assert `command -v rg` else exit 1 with hint pointing at `scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh`. (3) Print `rg --version` for the verifier log. (4) Assert manifest exists: `test -f plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`. (5) Run `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::ripgrep_manifest_parses` with the WO-0042 alternation regex `grep -Eq 'test result: ok\. 1 passed; 0 failed|1 tests? passed'`. (6) Exercise structured JSON output: `rg --json 'fn evaluate' tests/fixtures/rust-project | tee /tmp/wo-0051-json.log` then assert `grep -q '"type":"match"' /tmp/wo-0051-json.log` AND `grep -q '"path"' /tmp/wo-0051-json.log` AND `grep -q '"text":"fn evaluate' /tmp/wo-0051-json.log`. The pattern targets `pub fn evaluate(expr: &Expr)` at `tests/fixtures/rust-project/src/util.rs:128` (read-only fixture per forbidden_paths). (7) Verify `.gitignore` is honoured at the repo root: build the workspace (`cargo build --workspace --quiet` so `target/` exists), then run `rg --files-with-matches 'fn evaluate' . 2>&1 | tee /tmp/wo-0051-gitignore.log` and assert `! grep -E '^\./target/|^target/' /tmp/wo-0051-gitignore.log` (ripgrep MUST NOT descend into `target/` per the workspace `.gitignore:2`). (8) On all-green print `[OK] P2-W7-F07` exit 0; on any failure print `[FAIL] P2-W7-F07: <reason>` exit 1. `chmod +x scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh`. Pre-bake 3 mutation entries in `acceptance` per the WO-0042 → WO-0050 standing protocol (now 8th consecutive WO).
scope_in: Create NEW `plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` modeled on `plugins/search/probe/plugin.toml` (the closest sibling — same `plugins/search/` group, same general manifest shape). Header comment block (10–18 lines) cites: master-plan §14.1 (search category), DEC-0009 (ripgrep is in-process — manifest is metadata; runtime lives at `crates/ucil-daemon/src/text_search.rs` from WO-0035), and the rationale for the `command = "rg"` / `args = ["--version"]` sentinel transport (the existing `PluginManifest` schema requires a `[transport]` section with type/command; the daemon's ripgrep code path bypasses this transport per DEC-0009 — the manifest is declarative metadata so the planning layer can enumerate ripgrep as a `search.text` source without requiring an MCP server). `[plugin]` table: `name = "ripgrep"`, `version = "<binary version reported by 'rg --version'>"` (executor pins to the actual version on the system, e.g. `"14.1.1"` — NOT a moving `main` ref), `description = "Fast text search via ripgrep CLI; in-process runtime per DEC-0009."`. `[capabilities]` table: `provides = ["search.text"]` (one capability — ripgrep is text-only, NOT structural/AST), `languages = []` (ripgrep is language-agnostic regex/text search; the empty list signals 'all languages' to the planner, matching the existing `CapabilitiesSection.languages` semantics at `crates/ucil-daemon/src/plugin_manager.rs:170`). `[transport]` table: `type = "stdio"`, `command = "rg"`, `args = ["--version"]` (sentinel — the daemon's DEC-0009 in-process path short-circuits this; if any future code path attempts to spawn this transport as an MCP server, the `rg --version` exit would correctly fail health-check, which is the desired behavior — ripgrep is NOT an MCP server). `[lifecycle]` table: `hot_cold = false`, `idle_timeout_minutes = 0` (ripgrep is per-query spawn-and-exit; there is no resident process to hot/cold cycle).

Create NEW `scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh`. Idempotent shell script matching the `scripts/devtools/install-ast-grep.sh` / `install-probe.sh` shape: `#!/usr/bin/env bash` + `set -euo pipefail`, detect `command -v rg` (print version + exit 0 if present), otherwise print 3 install hints (`cargo install ripgrep`, `brew install ripgrep`, `apt-get install -y ripgrep`) and exit 0 (no auto-execute). Header comment cites WO-0051 + P2-W7-F07. `chmod +x` so the script is executable.

EXTEND `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` (existing file from WO-0044) by adding ONE new sync test `#[test] fn ripgrep_manifest_parses()` INSIDE the existing `mod plugin_manifests { ... }` block (the wrapper at line 36 of the existing file — DEC-0007 module-root frozen-selector placement specifically applies inside this wrapper for this file because nextest reports tests as `plugin_manifests::<fn_name>` per WO-0044 acceptance selectors). Sync `#[test]` (NOT `#[tokio::test]`) — the test is parse-only, no async/IO. Test body: (1) `let manifest = PluginManifest::from_path(repo_root().join("plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml")).expect("ripgrep manifest must parse cleanly");` — reuse the existing `repo_root()` helper at lines 52-60 of the file. (2) `assert_eq!(manifest.plugin.name, "ripgrep");`. (3) `assert!(manifest.capabilities.provides.contains(&"search.text".to_string()), "capabilities.provides must include search.text; observed {:?}", manifest.capabilities.provides);`. (4) `assert!(manifest.capabilities.languages.is_empty(), "capabilities.languages must be empty (ripgrep is language-agnostic); observed {:?}", manifest.capabilities.languages);`. (5) Cite DEC-0009 in a `//` comment line ABOVE the test explaining why this test does NOT call `PluginManager::health_check` (ripgrep is in-process; the `[transport]` is a declarative sentinel). NO `health_check` call. NO mocks. Use `assert_eq!` / `assert!` with operator-readable panic messages quoting the actual observed value on failure (per WO-0042 lessons).

REWRITE `scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh` (current 6-line `TODO; exit 1` stub at scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh:1-6). New script: (a) header `#!/usr/bin/env bash` + `set -euo pipefail` + `IFS=$'\n\t'`. Header comment block (15–25 lines) cites WO-0051, P2-W7-F07, DEC-0009, and the 4 sub-checks (cargo test, JSON-output smoke, gitignore-respect smoke, manifest existence). (b) `REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$REPO_ROOT"`. (c) Assert ripgrep on PATH: `if ! command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[FAIL] P2-W7-F07: rg not on PATH; see scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh" >&2; exit 1; fi`. (d) Print `rg --version` (first line) for the verifier log. (e) Assert manifest exists: `test -f plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml || { echo "[FAIL] P2-W7-F07: missing plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml" >&2; exit 1; }`. (f) Run cargo test: `CARGO_LOG="/tmp/wo-0051-cargo.log"; cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::ripgrep_manifest_parses 2>&1 | tee "$CARGO_LOG" >/dev/null` then `grep -Eq 'test result: ok\. 1 passed; 0 failed|1 tests? passed' "$CARGO_LOG"` else `[FAIL]` exit 1. (g) JSON smoke against fixture: `JSON_LOG="/tmp/wo-0051-json.log"; rg --json 'fn evaluate' tests/fixtures/rust-project 2>&1 | tee "$JSON_LOG" >/dev/null` then assert ALL three: `grep -q '"type":"match"' "$JSON_LOG"`, `grep -q '"path"' "$JSON_LOG"`, `grep -q 'fn evaluate' "$JSON_LOG"`. (`pub fn evaluate(expr: &Expr)` lives at `tests/fixtures/rust-project/src/util.rs:128` and `fn evaluate` substring appears in both signatures and JSON output text fields.) (h) `.gitignore`-respect smoke at repo root. First ensure `target/` exists: `cargo build --workspace --quiet 2>&1 | tail -20 || true` (warm the workspace; if already built this is a fast no-op). Then `IGNORE_LOG="/tmp/wo-0051-gitignore.log"; rg --files-with-matches 'fn evaluate' . 2>&1 | tee "$IGNORE_LOG" >/dev/null` and assert `! grep -Eq '(^|/)target/' "$IGNORE_LOG"` (ripgrep must NOT descend into `target/` per the workspace `.gitignore:2` line `target/`). On match, `[FAIL] P2-W7-F07: ripgrep returned target/ paths — .gitignore not honoured` exit 1. Also assert the search DID find at least one in-tree match: `grep -q 'tests/fixtures/rust-project/src/util.rs' "$IGNORE_LOG"` (proves the search actually ran and returned the fixture's `evaluate` function). (i) Final `[OK] P2-W7-F07` print + exit 0. `chmod +x scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh`.

**No daemon source-code changes.** The plugin manifest parser (WO-0042), capabilities schema (WO-0042), lifecycle code (WO-0042 / WO-0043), and `text_search.rs` ripgrep wiring (WO-0035 per DEC-0009) all stay frozen. This WO ONLY adds a new manifest file + a new dev-tools script + ONE new parse-only test inside the existing test file + a rewrite of the existing F07 verify-script stub. Zero edits under `crates/ucil-daemon/src/**`. Zero edits to `crates/ucil-daemon/Cargo.toml` (no new deps).

**No `health_check` round-trip.** Per DEC-0009, ripgrep runs in-process via `crates/ucil-daemon/src/text_search.rs` — the manifest's `[transport]` is a declarative sentinel and MUST NOT be spawned as an MCP server. Document this explicitly in: (a) the manifest's header comment, (b) the rust test's leading `//` comment, (c) the verify-script's header comment. Forward verifiers and triage agents need a clear pointer that ripgrep's plugin shape diverges from ast-grep + probe.

**No modifications to existing manifests.** `plugins/structural/serena/plugin.toml`, `plugins/structural/ast-grep/plugin.toml`, `plugins/search/probe/plugin.toml` stay byte-identical. The verify script does not touch them. The new test does not touch them. WO-0044 acceptance selectors `plugin_manifests::ast_grep_manifest_health_check` and `plugin_manifests::probe_manifest_health_check` MUST stay green as regression sentinels (AC07 and AC08 below).

**No fixture modifications.** `tests/fixtures/rust-project/**` is read-only per `forbidden_paths`. The verify script's smoke tests adapt to whatever symbols already exist in the fixture (`pub fn evaluate(expr: &Expr)` at `tests/fixtures/rust-project/src/util.rs:128` — confirmed at planning time).

**Pre-bake 3 mutation entries in `acceptance`.** Pattern carried from WO-0042 → WO-0050 (now 8th consecutive WO using pre-baked mutations as the authoritative anti-laziness layer per DEC-0007). The mutations target the manifest itself (since the manifest is the artifact-under-test) plus the script's structured-JSON check. See AC15–AC17 below for the literal sed + restore commands and the predicted runtime panic line.

**Allow-list verification with three-dot diff.** Per the WO-0046 → WO-0050 standing protocol (now 5th consecutive WO using `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` for AC instead of two-dot). Acceptance allow-list (AC22) lists ONLY the new/edited paths in this exact set: `plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`, `scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh`, `scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh`, `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs`, `ucil-build/work-orders/0051-ready-for-review.md`. (`Cargo.lock` is NOT expected — no Cargo.toml changes.)

**Commit ladder** — approximately 4 commits, each ≤80 LOC (DEC-0005 module-coherence applies for the test extension): (1) `feat(plugins): add ripgrep plugin manifest under plugins/search/ripgrep/` (~30 LOC TOML + comment block), (2) `chore(devtools): add install-ripgrep.sh helper` (~25 LOC bash), (3) `test(daemon): extend plugin_manifests with ripgrep_manifest_parses` (~30 LOC Rust inside existing `mod plugin_manifests {}` block), (4) `feat(verify): implement scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh end-to-end` (~80 LOC bash including header comment + 4 sub-checks).
scope_out: **No changes to ANY Rust source under `crates/ucil-daemon/src/**`** — plugin manifest parser (WO-0042), lifecycle/hot-reload/circuit-breaker code (WO-0042/0043), `text_search.rs` ripgrep wiring (WO-0035), and every other source file under that tree are FROZEN for this WO. The new manifest exercises the existing `PluginManifest::from_path` surface unchanged.

**No `crates/ucil-daemon/Cargo.toml` modifications.** No new deps. The existing `[dev-dependencies]` (`tokio`, `tempfile`, etc.) cover the parse-only test. If a NEW dep is genuinely required, escalate via ADR before adding.

**No MCP `health_check` round-trip on ripgrep.** Per DEC-0009, ripgrep is in-process — calling `health_check` would spawn `rg --version` which doesn't speak JSON-RPC and would (correctly) fail. The new test is parse-only.

**No modifications to existing manifests** (`plugins/structural/serena/plugin.toml`, `plugins/structural/ast-grep/plugin.toml`, `plugins/search/probe/plugin.toml`) — frozen per WO-0013, WO-0044 acceptance.

**No new plugin under `plugins/architecture/`, `plugins/context/`, `plugins/knowledge/`, `plugins/platform/`, `plugins/quality/`, `plugins/testing/`, or `plugins/structural/scip/` / `joern/`** — those are out-of-phase or sibling-feature scope (e.g. SCIP P1 = P2-W7-F08).
**No `ucil plugin` CLI changes** (P2-W6-F07 sealed in WO-0045).
**No G1/G2 fusion logic, no `find_references` / `search_code` / `find_definition` MCP tool wiring** — those are P2-W7-F01..F06 features, sealed by WO-0047 / WO-0048 / WO-0049 / WO-0050.
**No embedding pipeline / ONNX / LanceDB / CodeRankEmbed work** — those are P2-W8-F01..F08 features.
**No fixture modifications.** `tests/fixtures/rust-project/**` is read-only per root CLAUDE.md and forbidden_paths. The smoke tests adapt to existing symbols.
**No `#[ignore]`, `.skip()`, `xfail`, commented-out assertions, `todo!()`, `unimplemented!()`, `pass`-only test bodies** — forbidden by root CLAUDE.md.

**No mocks** of `tokio::process::Command`, `Child`, `ChildStdio`, or any process-spawning surface. The new parse-only test does not spawn anything; the verify script invokes real `rg` and real `cargo test` subprocesses.
**No `git commit --no-verify`, `--amend` after push, or force-push** — forbidden by root CLAUDE.md.

**No edits to `ucil-build/feature-list.json`, `feature-list.schema.json`, `tests/fixtures/**`, `scripts/gate/**`, `scripts/flip-feature.sh`, `ucil-master-plan-v2.1-final.md`, `.githooks/**`, `.claude/agents/**`, `.claude/hooks/**`, `.claude/settings.json`, or any phase-log / decisions / post-mortems** — explicit `forbidden_paths` enforcement.

**No new ADR.** DEC-0007 (frozen-selector module-root placement inside `mod plugin_manifests {}`), DEC-0009 (ripgrep in-process), DEC-0005 (module-coherence commits), DEC-0010 (`ucil-tests-integration` package — not used here since we extend an existing per-crate test file) all cover the WO. If a NEW pattern surfaces (e.g. surprise schema change in `PluginManifest`, ripgrep version-string parsing oddity blocking the manifest pin, fixture missing the expected `evaluate` symbol), STOP and write an ADR before working around.
acceptance: AC01 — `test -f plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` (manifest exists at the canonical path).
AC02 — `test -x scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh` (verify script is executable; `chmod +x` was applied).
AC03 — `test -x scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh` (install hint is executable).
AC04 — `grep -q '^name = "ripgrep"' plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` (TOML `[plugin].name` is exactly `ripgrep`).

AC05 — `grep -q '"search.text"' plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` (capabilities declare the `search.text` provider). Tighter check: `grep -q 'provides = \["search.text"\]' plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` (single capability, exact form).
AC06 — `! grep -q '"main"' plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml` (no moving `main` refs — `commit-style.md` forbids).

AC07 — `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::ripgrep_manifest_parses -- --nocapture` exits 0 with the cargo-test alternation regex `grep -Eq 'test result: ok\. 1 passed; 0 failed|1 tests? passed'` matching the captured output.

AC08 — Test selector `plugin_manifests::ripgrep_manifest_parses` lives INSIDE the existing `mod plugin_manifests { }` block at `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` (per the WO-0044 wrapper convention for this file). Verifier checks via `grep -nE '^\s*fn ripgrep_manifest_parses' crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` returning exactly one line; `#[test]` attribute is on the line immediately above. Note: the WO-0044 file uses `mod plugin_manifests { ... }` instead of module-root placement specifically because nextest's path resolution depends on this wrapper for `--test plugin_manifests <selector>` invocations. DEC-0007 module-root placement is honoured at the module-root *of the wrapper*, NOT at the file root.

AC09 — `bash scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh` exits 0 on a system with `rg` on PATH. The script must print `[OK] P2-W7-F07` on the final success line. Verifier captures the full script output to `/tmp/p2-w7-f07-verify.log` and inspects: `[INFO]` line for `rg --version`, `[INFO]` line confirming cargo test PASS, `[INFO]` line confirming JSON-shape sub-check PASS, `[INFO]` line confirming `.gitignore` sub-check PASS.

AC10 — JSON output sub-check: the verify script's `rg --json 'fn evaluate' tests/fixtures/rust-project` invocation produces output matching ALL three structural checks (`grep -q '"type":"match"'`, `grep -q '"path"'`, `grep -q 'fn evaluate'`). Confirms ripgrep's `--json` flag emits structured per-line JSON with `type`/`path`/`text` keys per ripgrep upstream `man rg` JSON output documentation.

AC11 — `.gitignore`-respect sub-check: the verify script's `rg --files-with-matches 'fn evaluate' .` invocation at the repo root produces output matching `grep -Eq '(^|/)target/' /tmp/wo-0051-gitignore.log` returning ZERO matches (ripgrep MUST NOT descend into `target/` per the workspace `.gitignore:2` line `target/`). The same invocation MUST find `tests/fixtures/rust-project/src/util.rs` (the in-tree fixture's `evaluate` function) — proves ripgrep is searching the workspace, just skipping ignored dirs.

AC12 — WO-0044 regression sentinels: `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::ast_grep_manifest_health_check -- --nocapture` exits 0 AND `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::probe_manifest_health_check -- --nocapture` exits 0. Adding the new ripgrep parse-only test MUST NOT regress the two existing health-check tests (running `npx -y` against ast-grep + probe upstream packages).

AC13 — WO-0042/WO-0043 regression sentinels: `cargo test -p ucil-daemon plugin_manager::test_manifest_parser plugin_manager::test_lifecycle_state_machine plugin_manager::test_hot_reload plugin_manager::test_circuit_breaker plugin_manager::test_hot_cold_lifecycle -- --nocapture` exits 0. The new manifest's existence on disk MUST NOT regress any plugin_manager unit test (e.g. the discover-walks-plugins-dir code path, if exercised in unit tests, must still parse the new manifest cleanly).

AC14 — Phase-1 e2e regression sentinels: `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test e2e_mcp_stdio --test e2e_mcp_with_kg -- --nocapture` exits 0. Adding the ripgrep manifest to `plugins/search/` MUST NOT regress the Phase-1 stdio MCP / KG-bootstrap e2e suites.
AC15 — Workspace-wide regression: `cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast` exits 0. Catches any cross-crate test that walks `plugins/` and is now seeing the new ripgrep manifest.

AC16 — `cargo clippy -p ucil-daemon --all-targets -- -D warnings` exits 0. Pre-flight grep on the test addition: `rg -nE '^\s*///.*\b[A-Z][A-Z_0-9]+\b' crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` returns zero hits OR every match is inside backticks (per WO-0043 lessons line 128 `clippy::doc_markdown`).
AC17 — `cargo fmt --check` exits 0 (after the test extension; the manifest TOML and shell scripts are not subject to rustfmt).

AC18 — `shellcheck scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh` exits 0 — or, if shellcheck is absent on PATH, the verify script's preamble logs `[INFO] shellcheck not on PATH; skipping shellcheck step` and continues (matches WO-0044 acceptance line 58 fallback).

AC19 — Pre-baked mutation #1 (manifest provides emptied):  
  Literal sed: `sed -i 's|provides = \["search.text"\]|provides = []|' plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`.  
  Restore: `git checkout -- plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`. Rerun: green.  
  Expected runtime failure on `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::ripgrep_manifest_parses`: panic at the `assert!(manifest.capabilities.provides.contains(&"search.text".to_string()), ...)` assertion (rust test sub-assertion 3 per scope_in[2] step 3) — observed `provides == []`, expected to contain `"search.text"`. Catches a regression where the manifest's capability declaration is silently emptied.

AC20 — Pre-baked mutation #2 (manifest plugin name corrupted):  
  Literal sed: `sed -i 's|^name = "ripgrep"|name = "x"|' plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`.  
  Restore: `git checkout -- plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`. Rerun: green.  
  Expected runtime failure on `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test plugin_manifests plugin_manifests::ripgrep_manifest_parses`: panic at the `assert_eq!(manifest.plugin.name, "ripgrep")` assertion (rust test sub-assertion 2 per scope_in[2] step 2) — observed `"x"`, expected `"ripgrep"`. Catches a regression where the manifest plugin identity is silently changed.

AC21 — Pre-baked mutation #3 (verify script `--json` flag corrupted):  
  Literal sed: `sed -i 's|rg --json 'fn evaluate'|rg 'fn evaluate'|' scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh` (drops the `--json` flag from the JSON-output sub-check command on step (g)).  
  Restore: `git checkout -- scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh`. Rerun: green.  
  Expected runtime failure on `bash scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh`: the `grep -q '"type":"match"' /tmp/wo-0051-json.log` check fails because non-JSON ripgrep output contains plain text `"file:line: text"` lines, not the JSON `"type":"match"` structural marker. Script prints `[FAIL] P2-W7-F07: ripgrep --json output missing structural marker` and exits 1. Catches a regression where the script claims to exercise the `--json` flag but actually doesn't.

AC22 — Allow-list verification (three-dot diff per WO-0046 → WO-0050 standing protocol — now 6th consecutive WO): `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` lists ONLY paths in this exact set: `plugins/search/ripgrep/plugin.toml`, `scripts/devtools/install-ripgrep.sh`, `scripts/verify/P2-W7-F07.sh`, `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs`, `ucil-build/work-orders/0051-ready-for-review.md`.
